note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left lower leg wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Left lower leg measures 5.2 cm x 2.4 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 40% slough, 60% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Venous venous Left lower leg — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
